title: Implement human-readable Crockford base32 node addresses (13 chars)
description: From oxul follow-up: Crockford base32 (no 0O1Il) of SHA256(Ed25519 pubkey) first ~65 bits → 13 char string (dashes every 4 chars e.g. KCVN-MRPX-QWERT). Update/create spec/03-addressing.md with full spec, collision analysis, examples. Add test vectors. Implement in Rust lichen-link::identity::pubkey_to_address() and C equivalent. Integrate with IID derivation (reuse hash). Update all references, CoAP, TUI, tests, docs. After code, run 3 full codereview passes. bd create children if epic too large for one bead. Fix ALL issues found. Close when done.
close_reason: Human readable node address fully implemented and verified. 3 codereview passes completed (all issues fixed). oxul follow-up done. Fix all completed.
